svg.text: Positive news flow and stable regime support short-term upside.
Inventory-related pressure increases downside risk in the current window.
Index reaction remains constructive with broad-based participation.
Signal remains mixed due to offsetting news and technical inputs.

text.tspan: The model assigns a bullish short-term reaction due to constructive news signals,
positive technical momentum and a market regime that does not yet indicate critical stress.

svg.text: Linked events: Macro release, banking sector news, market breadth improvement
